command:
echo "=== Check for duplicate openclaw/node processes on .199 ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "ps aux | grep -iE 'openclaw|node.*gateway|telegram' | grep -v grep"

echo ""
echo "=== Is there a SECOND openclaw instance anywhere? Check all VMs quickly ==="
for ip in 191 202; do
  echo "--- .$ip ---"
  ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=6 jose@192.168.0.$ip \
    "ps aux | grep -iE 'RemyDeviDollz|8993450718|openclaw' | grep -v grep | head -3 || echo none" 2>/dev/null
done

echo ""
echo "=== Force-clear the Telegram getUpdates lock: call getUpdates with high offset to drain ==="
# This releases any stuck server-side poll
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAEohhXQGCPXJse6u6IKjrcpZiZ_hLyragc/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=false' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(\"deleteWebhook:\", json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"ok\"))'"

echo ""
echo "=== Check how many openclaw-gateway services/units exist ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "systemctl --user list-units '*openclaw*' --no-pager 2>/dev/null; systemctl list-units '*openclaw*' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | head -5"
REMOTE
